title: Reduce AW-induced completion cost
lane_outcome: AW identifies, ranks, reduces, and re-measures meaningful AW-induced completion cost across representative bounded work while preserving intent, proof, residue, reviewability, handoff, and honest closure.
purpose_for_parent: Serve GitHub #1680 as the broad optimization lane for making the ordinary AW operating loop cheaper without hiding safety-critical signals or collapsing the work into one narrow fix.
technical_strategy: Run #1680 as a closed evidence loop: use static schema analysis to find likely AW-owned completion-cost suspects, actual JSON corpus analysis to rank real ordinary-output costs, long-horizon evaluation to prove behavior impact, then land one or more reductions through subtraction, merger, compression, routing, reuse, or sharper stop/closeout behavior. Start from compact issue comments and local review artifacts instead of replaying the long dogfooding thread.
technology_choices: checked-in Planning lane record for lane authority
GitHub issues as upstream coordination and child-slice references
existing summary, proof, and evaluation surfaces before adding new visible mechanisms

slice_sequence.title: Static completion-cost analysis for ordinary output schemas
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Use #1690 to identify large required compact fields, duplicated concepts, prose-heavy advisory fields, always-present empty diagnostics, deeply nested next-action/proof/closure state, and fields lacking selector/detail routing.
slice_sequence.proof: Static analyzer and tests landed: uv run pytest tests/test_completion_cost_schema_analysis.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_completion_cost_schema_analysis.py --format json --max-findings-per-surface 3; ruff; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace; summary and planning doctor.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: Actual JSON corpus analysis must confirm which static suspects matter in ordinary command output.

slice_sequence.title: Actual JSON completion-cost corpus for ordinary AW outputs
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Use #1691 to measure byte size, top fields, empty/default ratios, repeated strings, prose-vs-structured bytes, duplicate concepts, actionability density, and selector escape hatches.
slice_sequence.proof: Actual JSON corpus analyzer landed: uv run pytest tests/test_completion_cost_json_corpus.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_completion_cost_json_corpus.py --format text --timeout-seconds 60; ruff. Live run measured 4 ordinary samples and emitted ranked observations.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: Long-horizon evaluation must connect ranked surfaces to completion behavior.

slice_sequence.title: Long-horizon behavior evidence for completion-cost impact
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Reuse and strengthen #1602 to show whether suspected surfaces cause rereads, proof churn, over-planning, stale residue, review/repair loops, unsafe closure, or handoff/recovery failures.
slice_sequence.proof: External-agent evaluation pack records representative completion-cost observation support plus checked-in allowed-model live evidence. The refreshed Codex GPT 5.4 Mini memory-consult run repaired the prompt-resistant local absolute Markdown link in exported final_message/session.md, and check_completion_cost_live_behavior_proof.py reports status complete.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: Live long-horizon behavior proof is complete for the checked-in evidence pack; remaining #1680 closure work is child issue reconciliation, remaining-cost owner decisions, and explicit parent close permission.

slice_sequence.title: Land the first meaningful AW-induced cost reductions
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Apply evidence to #1608 and the near-term tranche from #1692, #1693, and #1694 when those are the cheapest representative reductions.
slice_sequence.proof: Merged selector-first and proof-cost slices route or compact startup detail, skill catalog detail, implement candidate pressure, implement Memory detail, fresh-session digest context, proof retry guidance, proof failure summaries, PR comment deltas, and installed-state drift signals while preserving rollback conditions and focused regressions.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: Before/after signals are recorded in surface decisions and the closure evidence packet; residual cost sources are routed to follow-up owner issues.

slice_sequence.title: Record before/after lane closure evidence
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Record compact evidence of what was optimized, what remains unresolved, and whether bounded work is measurably cheaper or cheaper to continue.
slice_sequence.proof: Lane proof aggregation includes static, corpus, behavior, reduction, and re-measurement evidence plus explicit routing for non-blocking follow-up cost sources.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: Parent #1680 is closed; residual improvement topics remain tracked by #1697, #1698, #1700-#1704, #1706, and #1616/#1729-#1731 as follow-up owner surfaces.

acceptance_boundary: This lane is complete only when the evidence loop has found, ranked, reduced, and re-measured meaningful AW-induced cost across representative bounded work. Closure must distinguish landed reductions, the intent served, unresolved cost sources, and whether small bounded work is actually cheaper, without weakening proof, intent preservation, residue routing, reviewability, handoff, recovery, or honest closure.
proof_strategy: Aggregate proof from the five lane slices: static schema suspect inventory, actual JSON corpus ranking, long-horizon behavior evidence, at least one landed reduction, and before/after measurement. A useful one-off fix or cost report is partial evidence, not lane completion.

evidence: scripts/check/check_completion_cost_schema_analysis.py emits structured static suspects for start, implement, and report ordinary surfaces.
scripts/check/check_completion_cost_json_corpus.py captures and ranks actual ordinary JSON outputs for start, summary, implement, and doctor samples.
tools/model-cli-harness/external-agent-evaluation/result-records.sample.json records representative completion-cost observations for Codex GPT 5.3 Spark scenarios.
tools/model-cli-harness/external-agent-evaluation/live-results-2026-06-18.json records checked-in allowed-model live-run evidence for the long-horizon behavior gate.
.agentic-workspace/planning/closeout-evidence/github-1680-live-behavior-proof-gate-2.closeout.json records the prior live proof gate and the formerly routed OWNERSHIP_BOUNDARY_LEAK blocker.
scripts/check/check_completion_cost_live_behavior_proof.py now reports live behavior proof as complete for the checked-in evidence pack.
tools/model-cli-harness/external-agent-evaluation/surface-decisions.sample.json records before/after cost signals and rollback conditions for landed reduction slices.

.agentic-workspace/planning/closeout-evidence/github-1680-before-after-closure-evidence.closeout.json records compact before/after evidence, child issue reconciliation, routed follow-up cost sources, and granted parent close permission.
scripts/check/check_completion_cost_lane_evidence.py aggregates the #1680 evidence loop and reports ready-for-closeout-review when blockers remain reconciled.
known_gaps: Follow-up improvements remain tracked outside the closed parent lane: #1697, #1698, #1700-#1704, #1706, and #1616/#1729-#1731.

residual_lane_work: Closed for #1680 evidence-loop purposes. Completed child issues #1692-#1696 are supported by merged PRs. Remaining improvement topics are routed follow-ups rather than parent blockers: #1697, #1698, #1700-#1704, #1706, and #1616/#1729-#1731.
lane_to_epic_contribution: Provides the checked-in Planning owner for GitHub #1680 and keeps child optimization issues tied to a strict evidence loop rather than isolated fixes.

closeout_state.summary: Static analysis, actual JSON corpus analysis, representative behavior observations, clean checked-in live proof evidence, first-tranche reduction signals, and compact before/after closeout evidence have landed. Parent #1680 is closed externally and local close permission is granted because remaining cost sources are routed to follow-up owner issues.
closeout_state.residual_work: Continue follow-up owner issues outside the parent lane: #1697, #1698, #1700-#1704, #1706, and #1616/#1729-#1731.

notes: Ingested from GitHub #1680 on 2026-06-23. Static schema analysis (#1690) and actual JSON corpus ranking (#1691) landed as the first measurement slices; promote long-horizon behavior proof next and use Codex GPT 5.3 Spark or GPT 5.4 Mini when running evaluations. Do not close this lane after one useful fix; a small dogfooding batch is partial progress unless the full evidence loop is satisfied.
